on_screen_text:
Priya yaar... [Priya, my friend...]
Aaj neha ne mala reject kela [Today Neha rejected me]
Mi mhantla "i am loving you since long time" [I said "I am loving you since long time"]
Ti hasun mhantli "adhi neet english bolayla shik" [She laughed and said "first learn to speak English properly"]
Tithe dusre friends pan hote khup apman jhala maza [Other friends were also there, I felt very humiliated]
Arjun, haar maan nako [Arjun, don't give up]
Mi pan aadhi tujhya sarkhi English bolayche [I also used to speak English like you before]
Pan MySivi app vapralya-pasun sagla badlun gelay. [But since using the MySivi app, everything has changed.]
MySivi??
Ho! Ithe AI teacher Arya aahe [Yes! Here is AI teacher Arya]
Roz fakt 15 minute tichyashi bol, agdi mitra sarkha [Just speak with her for 15 minutes daily, just like a friend]
Chuk jhali? Judge nahi karat, fakt correct karte [Made a mistake? She doesn't judge, she just corrects you]
Mhanje ajun hi hope aahe?? [That means there is still hope??]
Nakkich! [Definitely!]
2 week practice kar... tujhi English itki improve hoil ki Neha pan impress hoil [Practice for 2 weeks... your English will improve so much that even Neha will be impressed]
Pan he expensive asel na? [But this must be expensive, right?]
Nahi, fakt ₹1! [No, just ₹1!]
Wow!
Mi attaach download karto [I am downloading it right now]
2 haftyanantar Neha la perfect English madhye propose karnaar [After 2 weeks, I will propose to Neha in perfect English]
All the best! MySivi download kar ani suru kar [All the best! Download MySivi and start]
MySivi AI English Speaking...
Master Spoken Eng: Sharpen your English with 1-on-1 calls. Try MySivi today.
summary: The ad features a simulated WhatsApp conversation where a user named Arjun shares his embarrassment after being rejected by a girl due to his poor English. His friend Priya recommends the MySivi app, highlighting its non-judgmental AI teacher, Arya, and an affordable price of just ₹1. Arjun is motivated to download the app immediately to improve his English and win over his crush.
